title: chrysanthemum arcticum subsp. yezoense
intro: Chrysanthemum arcticum subsp. yezoense, also known as Yezo chrysanthemum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of northeastern Japan and the Kuril Islands. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower body temperature and relieve fever, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The Yezo chrysanthemum is valued for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Yezo chrysanthemum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory infections and fever.
